creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Konstantin Belousov from comment #18)
> I wonder if this something fixed by b3f46656393f5c8a6e8305af.
Interesting.  Looks like they forgot to merge it to stable/13:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/log/sys/fs/ext2fs/ext2_extents.c?h=stable/13

I'll be updating my laptop which manifests this bug to 13.2-RELEASE tonight and report if our fresh release is buggy or not.
